title: Poster Type Foundry
description: A generative typographic poster machine — five layout algorithms, live jitter and palette controls, PNG export and shareable links.
concept: Type any short phrase and watch it composed into a poster by one of five procedural layout engines — a circular arc, an Archimedean spiral, a diagonal cascade, a warped grid, and a staggered waterfall. Seeded jitter keeps every render reproducible, six palettes cover the mood, and the whole design saves, shares, and exports.
features: 5 distinct generative layout algorithms (arc, spiral, cascade, grid warp, waterfall)
Live parameter sliders — size, spacing/spread, jitter, weight — plus case-transform modes
One-tap PNG export at 2x resolution via canvas.toBlob
Named preset save/load/delete backed by localStorage, plus last-session autosave
Shareable link — full design state encoded into the URL hash and restored on load
Randomize button and tap-to-reshuffle jitter for instant fresh compositions

interaction.mouse: Drag sliders to tune size, spacing, jitter and weight; click a mode button or palette swatch
interaction.click: Click the canvas to reseed jitter for a fresh variation
interaction.touch: All controls are touch-friendly; tap the canvas to reshuffle
interaction.keyboard: Type directly into the text field to change the poster's phrase
